name: Hyperfine, Inc.
summary: Overview We are an innovative health technology business with a mission to revolutionize patient care globally through accessible, affordable, clinically relevant artificial intelligence (AI)-powered portable ultra-low-field (ULF) magnetic resonance (MR) brain imaging. Our Swoop Portable MR Imaging System (Swoop system) produces high-quality images at a significantly lower magnetic field strength than conventional magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scanners.
